untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pair-trading logic with dynamic OLS hedge ratio calculation between two separate assets (USO and GLD). The rule demands: (1) cross-asset regression analysis to compute hedge ratios from log prices, (2) construction of a synthetic spread portfolio across multiple instruments, (3) mean-reversion detection on the spread, and (4) context-dependent directional entry. The allowed indicator set supports single-asset technical analysis only and lacks: cross-asset correlation operators, multi-instrument portfolio construction, OLS regression outputs, spread statistics (z-scores, mean, std dev of synthetic spreads), and regime-dependent position scaling. The backtest engine appears designed for single-asset rules, not pairs trading strategies.
translation_notes: Signal involves sophisticated quantitative techniques (OLS hedge ratios, log-price spreads, market-neutral positioning) that fall outside the scope of single-asset indicator-based rules. Implementation would require custom pair-trading module with vector operations, rolling regression, and multi-leg position management. Critical missing parameters: lookback_period, deviation threshold, half_life. Source backtest shows 0.59 Sharpe ratio but insufficient detail to reconstruct entry/exit logic from excerpt alone.
